command_guidance: Produce a proper GDD and SDD for Snake.

captain_feedback: Captain Captain Ultra approves reuse of the established 'software-project-manager' role pattern. Proceed and adapt only where mission needs differ.
engineer_feedback: Chief Engineer confirms the existing template is suitable and should be reused for software-project-manager.

command_guidance: Own the model, gameplay rules, and unit tests.
Do not tangle gameplay logic with the terminal view.
